subcodes.title: Words to Mon. Richard, spoken on 1913-05-10
subcodes.first_line: He quoted the philosophic apothegms of the Sufi leaders stating that the Sufi idea about God is pantheistic
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق را بحر و موجودات را امواج و اشباح گویند اما انبیای الهی حق را مقدس از حلول و حدود دانند
subcodes.subjects: @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @pantheism, @symbolism, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mediator
